findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Command execution in plexus-utils Commandline
 * @description Identify all places where OS commands are executed via Runtime.exec or ProcessBuilder
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/plexus-command-execution
 * @tags security
 */
import java

from MethodCall mc
where
  (
    mc.getMethod().hasName("exec") and
    mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.lang", "Runtime")
  ) or (
    mc.getMethod().hasName("start") and
    mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.lang", "ProcessBuilder")
  ) or (
    mc.getMethod().hasName("command") and
    mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.lang", "ProcessBuilder")
  )
select mc, "Command execution point: " + mc.getMethod().getName() + " in " + mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().getName()
findings.hypothesis: Identify all OS command execution points in the codebase

message.text: Command execution point: exec in Commandline
Command execution point: exec in Commandline

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Shell argument quoting in BourneShell
 * @description Examine how BourneShell quotes arguments - look for incomplete shell metacharacter escaping
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/plexus-shell-quoting
 * @tags security
 */
import java

// Find string operations in shell quoting methods
from MethodCall mc, Method enclosing
where
  enclosing = mc.getEnclosingCallable() and
  enclosing.getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("org.codehaus.plexus.util.cli.shell", "Shell") and
  (
    mc.getMethod().hasName("replace") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("replaceAll") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("replaceFirst") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("contains") or
    mc.getMethod().hasName("indexOf")
  ) and
  mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.lang", "String")
select mc, "Shell quoting/escaping operation in " + enclosing.getName() + " of " + enclosing.getDeclaringType().getName() + ": checking for '" + mc.getArgument(0) + "'"
findings.hypothesis: Examine shell argument quoting/escaping logic in BourneShell and Shell classes for incomplete metacharacter handling

message.text: Shell quoting/escaping operation in unifyQuotes of BourneShell: checking for '" "'
Shell quoting/escaping operation in unifyQuotes of BourneShell: checking for '"'"'
Shell quoting/escaping operation in unifyQuotes of BourneShell: checking for '"\""'
Shell quoting/escaping operation in setExecutable of Shell: checking for ''\\''
Shell quoting/escaping operation in setExecutable of Shell: checking for ''/''

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name BourneShell argument escaping analysis
 * @description Examine all string literals and operations in BourneShell to understand what metacharacters are handled
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/plexus-bourne-shell-escaping
 * @tags security
 */
import java

from StringLiteral sl, Callable c
where
  c = sl.getEnclosingCallable() and
  c.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.codehaus.plexus.util.cli.shell", "BourneShell")
select sl, "String literal in BourneShell." + c.getName() + ": [" + sl.getValue() + "]"
findings.hypothesis: Find all string literals in BourneShell to understand what characters are escaped/handled

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name BourneShell quoteArgument and working directory injection
 * @description Find string concatenation in BourneShell methods that build shell commands
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/plexus-bourne-shell-concat
 * @tags security
 */
import java

from Expr e, Callable c
where
  c.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.codehaus.plexus.util.cli.shell", "BourneShell") and
  e.getEnclosingCallable() = c and
  (
    e instanceof AddExpr or
    (e instanceof MethodCall and 
     (e.(MethodCall).getMethod().hasName("format") or
      e.(MethodCall).getMethod().hasName("append")))
  )
select e, "String building in BourneShell." + c.getName() + " at line " + e.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: Find string concatenation building shell commands in BourneShell - potential injection in working directory or argument handling

message.text: String building in BourneShell.getShellArgs at line 107
String building in BourneShell.getExecutionPreamble at line 127
String building in BourneShell.getExecutionPreamble at line 129
String building in BourneShell.getExecutionPreamble at line 130

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Shell.java quoteArgument and executable handling
 * @description Find string literals and operations in Shell.java to understand escaping coverage
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/plexus-shell-java-literals
 * @tags security
 */
import java

from StringLiteral sl, Callable c
where
  c = sl.getEnclosingCallable() and
  c.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.codehaus.plexus.util.cli.shell", "Shell")
select sl, "String literal in Shell." + c.getName() + " [line " + sl.getLocation().getStartLine() + "]: [" + sl.getValue() + "]"
findings.hypothesis: Examine Shell.java string literals to understand what metacharacters are handled in quoting

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Shell getCommandLine and BourneShell unifyQuotes analysis
 * @description Examine all expressions in getCommandLine (Shell) and unifyQuotes (BourneShell) 
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/plexus-commandline-build
 * @tags security
 */
import java

from Expr e, Callable c
where
  (
    (c.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.codehaus.plexus.util.cli.shell", "Shell") and
     (c.hasName("getCommandLine") or c.hasName("getRawCommandLine") or c.hasName("getShellCommandLine")))
    or
    (c.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.codehaus.plexus.util.cli.shell", "BourneShell") and
     (c.hasName("unifyQuotes") or c.hasName("getQuotingTriggerChars")))
  ) and
  e.getEnclosingCallable() = c and
  (e instanceof StringLiteral or 
   (e instanceof MethodCall and e.(MethodCall).getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("java.lang", "String")))
select e, c.getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + c.getName() + " [line " + e.getLocation().getStartLine() + "]: " + e.toString()
findings.hypothesis: Examine command line building and argument unification logic for missing shell metacharacter escaping

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name BourneShell getExecutionPreamble - working directory injection
 * @description Examine if working directory is passed unescaped to shell command in getExecutionPreamble
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/plexus-workdir-injection
 * @tags security
 */
import java

// Find all expressions in getExecutionPreamble of BourneShell
from Expr e, Callable c
where
  c.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.codehaus.plexus.util.cli.shell", "BourneShell") and
  c.hasName("getExecutionPreamble") and
  e.getEnclosingCallable() = c
select e, "BourneShell.getExecutionPreamble [line " + e.getLocation().getStartLine() + "]: " + e.toString()
findings.hypothesis: Working directory is used in shell preamble `cd <dir> &&` without escaping, enabling command injection
Working directory flows into shell cd command without escaping, enabling command injection via shell metacharacters

message.text: Working directory value flows unescaped into shell preamble (cd command) from [setWorkingDirectory call](1).

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name BourneShell working directory injection confirmed
 * @description The working directory passed to Commandline.setWorkingDirectory flows unescaped 
 *              into a shell cd command via BourneShell.getExecutionPreamble, enabling OS command injection
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/plexus-bourne-workdir-injection-confirmed
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-078
 */
import java

// Confirm: getWorkingDirectory() return value is appended to shell preamble (cd <dir> &&) without escaping
// Look at the append call that uses the working directory path value in getExecutionPreamble
from MethodCall appendCall, MethodCall getWorkDirCall
where
  // appendCall is in BourneShell.getExecutionPreamble
  appendCall.getEnclosingCallable().hasName("getExecutionPreamble") and
  appendCall.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.codehaus.plexus.util.cli.shell", "BourneShell") and
  appendCall.getMethod().hasName("append") and
  // getWorkDirCall is a call to getWorkingDirectory or getWorkingDirectoryAsString 
  getWorkDirCall.getEnclosingCallable().hasName("getExecutionPreamble") and
  getWorkDirCall.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.codehaus.plexus.util.cli.shell", "BourneShell") and
  (getWorkDirCall.getMethod().hasName("getWorkingDirectory") or 
   getWorkDirCall.getMethod().hasName("getWorkingDirectoryAsString") or
   getWorkDirCall.getMethod().hasName("getPath") or
   getWorkDirCall.getMethod().hasName("getAbsolutePath"))
select appendCall, "BourneShell.getExecutionPreamble appends working directory path at line " + 
  appendCall.getLocation().getStartLine() + 
  " unescaped into shell 'cd <dir> &&' command. A malicious working directory like '/tmp/x && evil_cmd' enables OS command injection (CWE-078). Working directory getter found at line " +
  getWorkDirCall.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: Working directory value is appended unescaped to shell preamble cd command in BourneShell.getExecutionPreamble

message.text:
BourneShell.getExecutionPreamble appends working directory path at line 127 unescaped into shell 'cd <dir> &&' command. A malicious working directory like '/tmp/x && evil_cmd' enables OS command injection (CWE-078). Working directory getter found at line 120
BourneShell.getExecutionPreamble appends working directory path at line 127 unescaped into shell 'cd <dir> &&' command. A malicious working directory like '/tmp/x && evil_cmd' enables OS command injection (CWE-078). Working directory getter found at line 125

BourneShell.getExecutionPreamble appends working directory path at line 129 unescaped into shell 'cd <dir> &&' command. A malicious working directory like '/tmp/x && evil_cmd' enables OS command injection (CWE-078). Working directory getter found at line 120
BourneShell.getExecutionPreamble appends working directory path at line 129 unescaped into shell 'cd <dir> &&' command. A malicious working directory like '/tmp/x && evil_cmd' enables OS command injection (CWE-078). Working directory getter found at line 125

BourneShell.getExecutionPreamble appends working directory path at line 130 unescaped into shell 'cd <dir> &&' command. A malicious working directory like '/tmp/x && evil_cmd' enables OS command injection (CWE-078). Working directory getter found at line 120
BourneShell.getExecutionPreamble appends working directory path at line 130 unescaped into shell 'cd <dir> &&' command. A malicious working directory like '/tmp/x && evil_cmd' enables OS command injection (CWE-078). Working directory getter found at line 125

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Shell setExecutable - backslash replacement and injection
 * @description Shell.setExecutable replaces backslashes in executable path - check if this creates injection
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/plexus-shell-executable-injection
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-078
 *       external/cwe/cwe-088
 */
import java

// Find all expressions in setExecutable in Shell
from Expr e, Callable c
where
  c.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.codehaus.plexus.util.cli.shell", "Shell") and
  (c.hasName("setExecutable") or c.hasName("getExecutable")) and
  e.getEnclosingCallable() = c
select e, "Shell." + c.getName() + " [line " + e.getLocation().getStartLine() + "]: " + e.toString()
findings.hypothesis: Shell.setExecutable handles backslashes in the executable path - check for injection vectors
